articles.title: Congratulations to Distinguished Professor Chung-Yu Lan of the Department of Life Science / Institute of Molecular and Cellular Biology, College of Life Sciences and Medicine, on Receiving the 2026 MOE National Excellent Teacher Award.
Congratulations to Prof. Jia-Lin Lee of the Department of Medical Science on being appointed as a Distinguished Professor of National Tsing Hua University, effective from Academic Year 2026.
Congratulations to our faculty member on their promotion, effective August 1, 2026.

Congratulations to Assistant Professor Jian-Ming Huang and Assistant Professor Pin-Chao Liao of the College of Life Sciences and Medicine for receiving the new faculty research award for Academic Year 114.
